calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Anthony Alioto (Trustee).
Richard Rappaport for Maria Manalo (Beneficiary).
Erica Yuen for Jennifer Alioto and Nunzio Alioto.

Counsel reported that they are still working on settlement, that another proposal was made yesterday, that they still need to conduct discovery (depositions/document requests) and suggested a three to four month continuance. The Court set a discovery cut off date of August 29, 2017. The Petition for Order Directing Trustee to Make Distribution, etc. is also continued to August 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to have finished discovery, to talk as to what shape the evidentiary hearing is in and how long it will take, and trial will be set at that time. Mr. Rappaport asked the Court to require Ms. Yuen to file a pleading. The Court stated that it has nothing before it and no basis to order this today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Anthony Alioto (Trustee) and specially appearing for Attorney Ericka Yuen on behalf of the Beneficiaries and Attorney Richard Rappaport on behalf of Christine Manalo (Petitioner).

Ms. Robello requested a brief continuance stating that they reached a settlement, that they are working on final language and that they will not be requiring Court approval. The Petition for Order Directing Trustee to Make Distributions to Beneficiaries and Objections to Account is continued to May 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the matter will go off calendar on that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On Modification Of Trust Instrument And Determination Of Distribution To Income Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello & Kevin Lachona for (petitioner) Anthony Alioto. Erica Yuen for (beneficiaries/respondents) Jennifer Alioto Oliver & Nunzio Alioto. Richard Rappaport for (respondent) Maria Christina Manalo.

Ms. Robello presented oral argument regarding the modification of the trust. Mr. Rappaport stated that the petitioner has no standing, is unable to pay money owed to Ms. Manalo and would like the petition dismissed and the terms of the trust carried out as written. Ms. Yuen stated that this is a 17200 petition not a 15400 and that Ms. Manalo is being paid the $75,000.00 distribution. Ms. Robello stated that there are different interpretations by the beneficiaries, the trustee is 80 years old and that it is not prudent to wait the 5 years. The matter was taken under submission and parties are to submit proposed orders.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions On Modification Of Trust Instrument And Determination Of Distribution To Income Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Oct-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
